title: Music Cassettes (Celeste)
body:
Music Cassettes from Celeste

All Music Disks have been renamed to Music Cassettes.

All Music Disk textures have been changed.

No Sound Changes.

The original idea is from Lost_My_Marbles, we are both not the owners of these textures because they are from the Celeste game, but I still want to mention him because he gave me the idea for it.
